add_a_new_worksheet_to_a_microsoft_excel: Add a new worksheet to a Microsoft Excel workbook to hold a new dataset or report.
append_a_new_row_to_a_microsoft_excel: Append a new row to a Microsoft Excel table so it stays structured and formatted.
cell_range_e_g_a1_d10_defaults_to: Cell range (e.g., A1:D10). Defaults to used range for read, A1 for write.
cell_values_array_for_table_add_operatio: Cell values array for table add operations
describe_the_data_you_want_to_add_to: Describe the data you want to add to the table...
describe_the_data_you_want_to_update: Describe the data you want to update...
describe_the_data_you_want_to_write: Describe the data you want to write...
describe_the_range_e_g_a1_to_d50: Describe the range (e.g., "A1 to D50 on Sheet1")...
describe_the_range_e_g_first_50_rows: Describe the range (e.g., "first 50 rows" or "column A")...
details_of_the_newly_created_worksheet_w: Details of the newly created worksheet (worksheet_add operations)
drive_id_for_sharepoint_document_librari: Drive ID for SharePoint document libraries
enter_values_as_json_array_of_arrays_e: Enter values as JSON array of arrays (e.g., [["A1", "B1"], ["A2", "B2"]]) or an array of objects (e.g., [{"name":"John", "age":30}, {"name":"Jane", "age":25}])
excel_range_data_with_sheet_information_: Excel range data with sheet information and cell values
integrate_microsoft_excel_into_the_workf: Integrate Microsoft Excel into the workflow. Can read, write, update, add to table, and create new worksheets.
Integrate Microsoft Excel into the workflow with explicit sheet selection. Can read and write data in specific sheets.
leave_empty_for_onedrive_or_enter_drive_: Leave empty for OneDrive, or enter drive ID for SharePoint
name_of_the_new_worksheet_max_31_charact: Name of the new worksheet (max 31 characters)
read_and_write_data_with_sheet_selection: Read and write data with sheet selection
read_data_from_a_microsoft_excel_workshe: Read data from a Microsoft Excel worksheet range and return the rows.
row_index_for_table_add_operations: Row index for table add operations
sharepoint_site_id_used_for_drive_file_b: SharePoint site ID (used for drive/file browsing)
sheet_name_and_cell_range_e_g_sheet1: Sheet name and cell range (e.g., Sheet1!A1:D10)
spreadsheet_metadata_including_id_and_ur: Spreadsheet metadata including ID and URL
spreadsheet_metadata_including_id_url_an: Spreadsheet metadata including ID, URL, and sheet details
the_range_that_was_updated_write_operati: The range that was updated (write operations)
total_number_of_cells_updated_write_oper: Total number of cells updated (write operations)
write_or_update_values_in_a_microsoft_ex: Write or update values in a Microsoft Excel worksheet range, with formula parsing control.
